title: Humboldt Forum - Quick Summary
items: **The Humboldt Forum is partly free:** public areas, the courtyard and selected displays are free, but the main exhibitions are usually ticketed.
**The current day ticket is listed at EUR 14:** reduced EUR 7, with a two-day option and separate BERLIN GLOBAL ticket on the official admission page.
**The building replaced the Palast der Republik:** that makes it a debate about East German memory as much as royal architecture.
**The collections debate is central:** the Ethnological Museum and Museum of Asian Art include objects with colonial acquisition histories.
**The best quick visit is outside plus inside:** compare the palace facades, modern side and courtyard, then use the roof terrace or free public areas.
